reviews.review_title: Only got to see you one or two of the ep
reviews.review_description: Please let us know when you’ll be able to fix this
I added this game to my library maybe 2 years ago, and it still says there is something wrong with it. I’ve been hoping for a change but I don’t think that’ll happen anytime soon.

Bought this game a whole year ago and it’s still saying that there’s a problem with the game and it’s a “temporary fix” if your game isn’t working why keep it up for sale? Or why keep it to expensive for junk?
nice when it was working
It tells you it's a temporary thing, then forces you out
Even when the game was free it didn’t work, just don’t get it if it’s making you buy it, you’ll just refund it anyway, for me the error has been happening for abt a year
Hasn't worked in over a year. Wtf are the devs doing
I bought this game for about 30 dollars 7 months ago and I have never actually played it because they still haven’t fixed it yet.

When i tried this game all i got was an error messege saying that there was s problem but its been like it for over a month.

Im not happy that nothing seems to be happening about fixing it.

I want my money back
Nathan Woodmancote-Rhoades

I bought this game and was greeted with an error message (doesn't work).

******!!!!!DONT BUY!!!!!*********
Error message for months. Don’t waste your time
One of the first games I bought and it’s never worked 👎
App does not work, technical issues my butt! A complete waste of time getting it, months down the track I’m still waiting to play it.

This Ap is temporarily unavailable? Just how long is temporary? Felix & Paul have some of the best VR content around so it's really disappointing not to be able to use this ap. I say we all start boycotting their products. That might make them wake up to themselves. Absolutely disgraceful behaviour from the developers. They should be ashamed of themselves. Typical arrogant attitude. Hardly surprising from them.

I bought this month's ago and have yet to even be able to try it. I paid money for an app that doesn't work. The developers say they are fixing it. It's been about 4 months with no fix. At what point is it considered theft?

Just picked up the quest 3 and wanted this app since I love to experience space but I was let down. Never works. Thank God I didn't pay for this. I don't even want to give it a 1 star but its the minimum I can give, otherwise I'd give it a big 0.

I have yet to be able to check out this app as its been temporarily out of order. How long before this is ip and running? Please fix! I would love to check this app out. I hear it was amazing when it was running. Please any updates to the progress of it becoming available again would be greatly appreciated. I will update my review once I have been able to test it. Please hurry! Thanks so much. Anticipated user. 11/26/23
I paid for this app and have never been able to use it.   It continually stays it's under maintenance. I feel like I've been ripped off
Doesn’t work don’t waste your time

reviews.review_title: Was curious if this app is working now
reviews.review_description: The main reason I purchased a headset is because I wanted to watch the video cuz I've always been intrigued about space and bam hasn't worked since I got it feels kind of shoty do you know when it's going to be working cuz I'd really like to watch it I know last time y'all sent me contacts of where to look a little videos of it but I want to see the whole thing do you have an estimated time of when it'll be back on please let me know thank you
I bought this and another one. Both say they are having technical issues. Come on.. Get with it or refund the $$.
I got the game and you might be wondering ok wow but I can’t it because of this dumb error it’s been 7 days I never got to play it
App not working at all since I downloaded it what is going on people????
This app is unusable don’t buy it
Will it ever work?

Upon start up, the app displays a message it cannot run due to technical difficulties and advises you to check the website. 

Deleted. 

Would recommend removing from download until resolved with Devs.
Terrible app would like a refund because it doesn’t work
since purchasing
Just downloaded this and didn’t even start up
I get a message that the game has problems . It doesn’t do anything else . What a waste .
Game does not work better fix it
Hasnt worked since got the vr, alot of issues for something that costs so much.
Keeps saying it’s not working! Not available!!! When is it going to be fixed??? It’s been weeks now!
Please fix this asap , ty.

It’s amazing we have now found a way to see things differently, in VR. You really feel like you are there. It’s a very cool thing. I struggle with watching documentaries. I thought they did an excellent production and helped keep me entertained. Highly suggest watching these guys do something most of us could only dream of.
I work at NASA and until watching this, I had no real understanding of how spectacular it is to be onboard the ISS.

The spacewalk episode, in particular, is just amazing. The commentary provided by the astronauts and others is very insightful too. Keep in mind this is a non-interactive documentary, not a game.

Make sure to download to your headset rather than stream. There are some limitations with VR filming of course, but overall it's an excellent production. Viewed on a Quest Pro headset.

I’m not sure how anyone could rate this experience any less than a 5!

It was the first real deep dive for me after playing a few games.

The previews were exceptional. After downloading the full videos I was mesmerized.

This experience is the closest any of us will ever get to space. 

Hanging out in the ISS and seeing the the Earth from that perspective is priceless.

Having dinner with the 4 astronauts was amazing.

Well done!

Letting the viewer stowaway on the ISS.
A marvel of humanity. 
Gives us hope for the future.
While some choose to spread death and war here on earth, the people working on getting us to Mars and beyond are some of our greatest heroes.

It’s a really enjoyable documentary set that gives you better insight into what the experience of living in space feels like. All of these people are earnest and honest and seeing their story is really touching at times. If you like space, this one is for you.
I am speechless, it’s amazing!
Couldn’t uninstall the app.

developer_response.body:
Hello Bert, 
Could you send an email to customer_support@felixandpaul.com explaining the issue? Our team will take it from there. Thank you!

reviews.review_description:
How much more wild and grand in VR can you get than going to space? It was super fun and gorgeous. I look forward to more episodes.

I did notice that they added little asteroids around earth. I don’t think there are that many large rocks in stationary orbit.

This is exactly what I wanted out of VR. Everything done by Felix & Paul studio is amazing. So happy to discover this here with my new Oculus Quest 2. I can't wait till the new episodes aboard the ISS come out the spring! Your experience is even better if you cache the content. I've watched them multiple times, and the first one still makes me weep. This is the closest I will ever get to space, and I am grateful for it.
As close to being up there as it gets.
I’ve purchased 2 episodes. But it does not download or stream..

developer_response.body:
Hello guilherme.espind, 

Could you send an email to qa@felixandpaul.com explaining the issue? Our team will take it from there. Thank you!

reviews.review_title: The last frontier is now yours!
reviews.review_description:
If you ever dreamed to travel to space, now you can.
VR was meant for this!

I have send a mail to your address

Hello ringhio991, 

Could you send an email to qa@felixandpaul.com explaining the issue? Our team will take it from there. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: After opening the app, I'm trying to download the movie but it's not progressive It is still 0 mb/1.5gb after many minutes. My network is all ok.

developer_response.body:
Hello Firoz,
Following our recent exchange, and the subsequent resolution of your issue.
We hope you enjoy your experience moving forward, and welcome you to contact us in the future should you encounter any further issues. 

Email: customer_support@felixandpaul.com

reviews.review_description: App hasn’t worked for about a month. Which is a shame. The content is spectacular when it was working. Expected better

reviews.review_title: how long will it be until we can play
reviews.review_description:
i saw this game when a youtuber was playing and i was interested, me and my best friend played it, but i saw the screen about the bugs, it was around NOV 28th
please reply devs
very good game from watching it


-SAT DEC 2

Depending on the day there is no sound. I must close it and try again another day. Very annoying. Other than that and the fact that you must keep the app open while downloading the content, the experience is amazing (when it works)
You get a screen then gave to purchase in app to get view should just say you gave to pay from start

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback and your interest in Space Explorers. We have updated the description of the app to better reflect what is free, and what requires payment within the app. We hope that helps avoid any further confusion.

reviews.review_title: Cannot stream or download the video
reviews.review_description:
I purchased the advance video, but, even I see the option to stream or download, if i click on download button open the download bar but not download anything, if I chose to stream the screen became black and nothing happen. Please help me!!!

Update 17/8/2021
Look like the authors has fixed the server issue for the download  with some Hotspot.
Now with my mobile Hotspot I can download the movie.
It's really an incredible experience stand near the cosmonauts inside the ISS.
worth every penny.

developer_response.body:
Hello mattia.giovetti, 

We are glad that you got it working and enjoyed the experience. Thank you!

reviews.review_title: The best experience I have had on VR
reviews.review_description: Amazing documentaries. The footage is mind blowing. Very informative as well.
This is a very good game 5 stars
Every time I launch the app, I get a message saying they're working on technical difficulties and it will be resumed soon.  It's been several weeks and nothing. I'm deleting the app.
The story is impressive, nevertheless everything is blurry in Quest 2 to the point it hurts my eyes.

developer_response.body:
Hello Taisia38, 

Thank your for your feedback. We are glad you enjoyed the experience. Your feedback is noted for the team. We recommend downloading the experience as it is a higher quality than the stream. Nonetheless, the team will receive your feedback.

reviews.review_description: I thought this was incredible! Cannot wait to watch the second episode when it comes out. It’s amazing being onboard the ISS and you really get a feeling that you are there with them.

reviews.review_title: Rich story in emmersive 360 vr shots.
reviews.review_description: Good story, great shots and cool 360 vr real environment.
